'''Rebel gunners''' were [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Heavy Weapons Specialists]]. Along with [[Rebel Vanguard/Legends|Rebel vanguards]], they made up the 6th [[Regiment/Legends|Regiment]] of the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] heavy weapons specialists who operated repeating [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] or vehicle-mounted weapons, unlike their [[HH-15 projectile launcher|missile launcher]]-wielding counterparts.<ref name="Preview" />

At the [[Great Temple/Legends|Rebel base]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], gunnery crews manned [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] emplacements to provide air support for the base's [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] as they fought off [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] attacks launched by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Yavin blockade|blockade]] of the [[Yavin system/Legends|system]].<ref name="SW25" />

Rebel gunners were among the crew stationed at the Alliance's [[Mortex Sector HQ]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Fangol]], where they used the base's [[anti-aircraft gun]]s to fight off an Imperial [[Blitz on Fangol|blitz]].<ref name="Ice">[[Black Ice (adventure)|''Black Ice'']]</ref>
